'''wahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bymeby|bymeby]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bymeby|bymeby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wahate|wahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wahatesher|wahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahatesherĂ«m|wahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wahatero|wahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wahateshĂ«|wahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahateshĂ«m|wahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwahatero|gokiwahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwahateshĂ«|gokiwahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahateshĂ«m|gokiwahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowahankerom|gowahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowahankeshĂ«|gowahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowahankeshĂ«m|gowahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowahankeya|gowahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wahaterom|wahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahatemu|wahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wahateya|wahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwahaterom|gokiwahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahatemu|gokiwahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwahateya|gokiwahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wahahate|wahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wahahatesher|wahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahahatesherĂ«m|wahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wahahatero|wahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wahahateshĂ«|wahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahahateshĂ«m|wahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwahahatero|gokiwahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwahahateshĂ«|gokiwahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahahateshĂ«m|gokiwahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowahahankerom|gowahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowahahankeshĂ«|gowahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowahahankeshĂ«m|gowahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowahahankeya|gowahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wahahaterom|wahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahahatemu|wahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wahahateya|wahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwahahaterom|gokiwahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahahatemu|gokiwahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwahahateya|gokiwahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠhĂŠte|wĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠhĂŠtesher|wĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠhĂŠtero|wĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠhĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠhĂŠterom|wĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠhĂŠtemu|wĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠhĂŠteya|wĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠhĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠhĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafhafte|wafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafhaftesher|wafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafhaftesherĂ«m|wafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafhaftero|wafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafhafteshĂ«|wafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafhafteshĂ«m|wafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafhaftero|gokiwafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafhafteshĂ«|gokiwafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafhafteshĂ«m|gokiwafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafhafnkerom|gowafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafhafnkeshĂ«|gowafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafhafnkeshĂ«m|gowafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafhafnkeya|gowafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafhafterom|wafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafhaftemu|wafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafhafteya|wafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafhafterom|gokiwafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafhaftemu|gokiwafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafhafteya|gokiwafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
